title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China unveiled JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid robot with a split AI brain for real-time perception and control. Vietnam introduced two new humanoid platforms (Dyno and VR-H3) for homes, security, and factories. NVIDIA released the Isaac GR00T robot platform with Jetson Thor compute and Unitree H2 hardware for researchers.
